translation_text: He who knows (the Dao) does not (care to) speak (about it);
translation_text_raw: He who knows (the Dao) does not (care to) speak (about it);

translation_text: he who is (ever ready to) speak about it does not know it.
translation_text_raw: he who is (ever ready to) speak about it does not know it.

translation_text: He (who knows it) will keep his mouth shut and close the portals (of his nostrils).
translation_text_raw: He (who knows it) will keep his mouth shut and close the portals (of his nostrils).

translation_text: He will blunt his sharp points and unravel the complications of things;
translation_text_raw: He will blunt his sharp points and unravel the complications of things;

chinese_text: 故不可得而親，不可得而疏；
translation_text: he will attemper his brightness, and bring himself into agreement with the obscurity (of others).
translation_text_raw: he will attemper his brightness, and bring himself into agreement with the obscurity (of others).

translation_text: (Such an one) cannot be treated familiarly or distantly;
translation_text_raw: (Such an one) cannot be treated familiarly or distantly;

translation_text: he is beyond all consideration of profit or injury;
translation_text_raw: he is beyond all consideration of profit or injury;

translation_text: beyond all consideration of nobility or meanness:
translation_text_raw: beyond all consideration of nobility or meanness:

translation_text: - he is the noblest man under heaven.
translation_text_raw: - he is the noblest man under heaven.
